items.title: Dispersion Trading 101: Correlation, Variance, and the “Index vs Components” Game
items.excerpt: A two-asset, trader-friendly primer on dispersion: how correlation changes index variance, how to visualize the wedge, and how pros think about implied vs realized correlation.

items.title: Autocall Hedging: A Practical Framework
items.excerpt: A single-stock autocall is not a static short-vol trade. It rotates across delta, gamma, and vega as spot moves, time decays, skew shifts, and rates reprice discounting.

items.title: Gamma: Why Traders Buy High and Sell Low
items.excerpt: Long gamma often means buying weakness and selling strength. A clean intuition for dynamic hedging and volatility harvesting.

items.title: Risk Neutral Pricing (Without the Confusion)
items.excerpt: Why option pricing is built in a risk-neutral measure and why that framework remains operationally correct.

items.title: Basket Options and the Correlation Trap
items.excerpt: Why basket structures challenge simple lognormal assumptions and why correlation sits at the center of pricing and risk.
